summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 10×10 BLUE_E input grid + 8×8 output grid (initially empty). ValueTracker slide_tr sweeps 64 patch positions; always_redraw YELLOW 3×3 kernel box on input + progressive filling of output cells colored BLUE (negative) / RED (positive) by edge-detection kernel output [-1,-1,-1;-1,8,-1;-1,-1,-1].
